text: Which of the following is a correct statement

options.text: Steering gear is located at aft part of the ship
Rudder is connected to the propeller
Rudder is located in the steering flat
Propeller is turned by the rudder

explanation: The steering gear flat is located at the aft-most part of the ship, directly above or near the rudder assembly. This allows the steering gear hydraulic rams to engage with the rudder stock efficiently.
